argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/activity/get/?aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const items = (res.activity_list ?? []).map(a => ({ activity_id: a.activity_id, title: a.title ?? a.activity_name ?? '', end_time: typeof a.end_time === 'number' ? new Date(a.end_time * 1000).toLocaleString('zh-CN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Tokyo' }) : (a.show_end_time ?? '') })); return items; }
